coverage.update_schedule_note_en: GitHub Actions runs daily around 06:30 UTC (see .github/workflows/collect.yml).
coverage.window_note_en: Each run replaces items.json with a new snapshot from current listing pages and RSS/Atom feeds. Rows are whatever those surfaces show at fetch time—usually the last hours to a few days per outlet, not a curated multi-year archive.
coverage.trends_note_en: timeseries.json keeps a rolling window of 30 UTC days; each collect adds or updates today and drops older days.

timeseries.description_en: Daily counts per outlet (items + climate-flagged) for trend charts.
